auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Fiber AI API key used to authenticate requests. Create or copy a key from the Fiber AI API settings page: https://fiber.ai/app/api.

actions.name: get_org_credits
actions.description: Get Fiber AI organization credit balance and per-operation pricing metadata.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this Fiber AI action.

output.description: Raw object returned by the Fiber AI API.

chargeInfo.description: Fiber AI charge reconciliation object returned by the API.

items.description: A warning object returned by the Fiber AI API.

anyOf.description: Warnings returned by Fiber AI, when present.

advice.description: Advice strings returned by Fiber AI.

raw.description: Raw object returned by the Fiber AI API.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Fiber AI API response.
